commit.message:
Fix: Usar método correcto _cerrar_conexiones() en SmartSyncComplete

Error:
AttributeError: 'SmartSyncComplete' object has no attribute '_cerrar_bases_datos'

Problema:
- Se estaba llamando a sync._cerrar_bases_datos()
- Pero el método correcto es sync._cerrar_conexiones()
- SmartSyncComplete solo tiene estos métodos:
  * _conectar_bases_datos() ✅
  * _cerrar_conexiones() ✅
  * _cerrar_bases_datos() ❌ NO EXISTE

Solución:
- Cambiar sync._cerrar_bases_datos() por sync._cerrar_conexiones()
- Actualizar el mensaje de log también

Métodos correctos de SmartSyncComplete:
- Conexión: sync._conectar_bases_datos()
- Ejecución: sync.ejecutar_sync_completa()
- Cierre: sync._cerrar_conexiones()

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v0.1.2: Fix base image - alpine3.20 doesn't exist, use 3.13-alpine3.21

Root cause: ghcr.io/home-assistant/*-base-python:3.12-alpine3.20
does not exist. Available tags start at alpine3.21.
Changed to Python 3.13 on Alpine 3.21.

fix: ignore ArgoCD pre-delete finalizers on child Application CRDs

ArgoCD dynamically adds pre-delete-finalizer.argocd.argoproj.io to
Application CRDs during sync. These aren't in Git so app-of-apps sees
perpetual drift on /metadata/finalizers and stays OutOfSync forever.
ignoreDifferences on Application/finalizers resolves this.

commit.message:
fix(ci): upgrade Kotlin to 2.3.0 for Java 25 Android builds (#571)

* fix(ci): downgrade Java 25 to 24 for Android builds

Kotlin 2.1.x (bundled with Expo SDK 55 / RN 0.84) doesn't support
Java 25 bytecode yet, causing internal compiler errors in
expo-gradle-plugin. Java 24 is the latest version Kotlin supports.

Gradle 9.4.0 pin remains — it supports Java 21-25.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ci): upgrade Kotlin to 2.3.0 to support Java 25 in Android builds

Instead of downgrading Java from 25 to 24, upgrade Kotlin from 2.1.x
(bundled with RN 0.84) to 2.3.0 which has full Java 25 JVM target
support. Uses expo-build-properties android.kotlinVersion override.

Reverts JAVA_VERSION back to 25 (from the previous commit's 24).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
fix PromoVideo text size - rename main-text to text-main to escape AccessibilityWidget CSS override

The AccessibilityWidget injects:
  body div:not([class*="text-"]) { font-size: 1rem !important }
The class 'main-text' was matched (no 'text-' substring), overriding all font-size rules.
Renaming to 'text-main' escapes the selector since it starts with 'text-'.

commit.message:
Fix Google OAuth 500 for new users + null confidence crash in history (#28)

* Add startup diagnostics to find why server.js fails on Render

- Always start HTTP server even if DB init fails (so /api/ping responds)
- /api/ping reports dbReady status and full error if DB init failed
- /readyz now shows actual DB init state and error
- process.on uncaughtException/unhandledRejection log before exit
- Remove process.exit(1) on DB failure so server stays alive for diagnosis

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Gray out Save until text changes, clear saved state on edit

- Save button disabled when text matches saved value (no-op save prevented)
- Typing after save clears the "Saved" state so button re-enables
- Cancel resets text and clears saved indicator
- Saved confirmation reads "Saved to your journal" (was just "Saved")

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix missing await on getAuthContext in admin and upload routes

Three call sites were missing await, causing auth to resolve to a Promise
instead of the session object. Admin route always 403'd (showing 0 users/stats),
user uploads route and story PATCH always 401'd.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add unit, sanity, and functional test suites with TESTING.md guide

- unit.test.js: pure logic tests, run on every PR (auth, DB constants,
  server structure, no unawaited getAuthContext, no better-sqlite3, security)
- sanity.test.js: live production checks, run after every deploy
  (server alive, DB connected, Turso cloud URL, auth guards, core pages)
- e2e.test.js: full functional suite with DB/auth/email workflow checks,
  admin section, all pages, login/logout cycle (run as needed with creds)
- TESTING.md: runbook, diagnostic table, backup instructions
- package.json: npm run test (unit), test:sanity, test:e2e, test:all
- next.config.ts: proxy /healthz and /readyz to backend (were 404ing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add Playwright UI test suite with screenshots

19 browser tests covering real DOM elements and interactions:
- Homepage: title, headline text, upload area, Analyze button, quota display
- Auth modal: Log in/Sign Up Free, Google button, wrong-password error
- Pages: forgot-password, about, learn articles, privacy, terms headings
- Mobile (390px): no overflow, button tap target size
- Admin dashboard: stat cards, non-zero users (with creds)
- 404 and link integrity

Screenshots saved to tests/screenshots/ on failure (ignored in git).
Tests break when UI copy, structure, or interactions change — intentionally tight.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add error boundaries to recover from ChunkLoadError after deploys

Next.js shows "Application error: a client-side exception" when the browser
has cached old JS chunk URLs that no longer exist after a new deploy.
error.tsx and global-error.tsx detect ChunkLoadError and auto-reload,
picking up the fresh chunks instead of showing a blank error page.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add unit tests for ChunkLoadError error boundaries

Ensures error.tsx and global-error.tsx always exist and correctly handle
ChunkLoadError — the "Application error" shown after deploys when browsers
have cached stale JS chunk URLs. If either file is deleted or the auto-reload
logic is removed, unit tests will catch it before the next deploy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Guard ChunkLoadError auto-reload against infinite loop

Without the sessionStorage flag, if the reload itself fails (network issue,
error persists), the page reloads endlessly. Flag is set before reload so a
second occurrence shows the 'Something went wrong / Try again' UI instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix Google OAuth 500 for new users and null confidence crash in history

Two bugs blocking logged-in users:

1. server.js handleGoogleCallback: missing `await` on findUserAuthByGoogleSub()
   in the new-user creation path — user variable held a Promise, causing
   createSession() to fail with undefined userId → Internal Server Error.

2. history-table.tsx: primaryConfidence can be null for some scans. The
   reduce for Avg Confidence produced NaN, and isLowConfidence comparison
   with null threw in strict mode — causing the error boundary to fire for
   any logged-in user with scan history.

Also adds:
- Unit test to catch unawaited DB calls in handleGoogleCallback
- Sanity tests for auth endpoint response shapes and homepage SSR health

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix unit test CI failure: read db constants from source, not require()

Requiring src/db.js in CI crashes because there's no TURSO_DATABASE_URL
and no local db file. Parse the default values from source text instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
feat: add sim2sim package for MuJoCo policy validation

Complete sim2sim pipeline for validating Isaac Lab trained RL and mimic
policies in MuJoCo before deploying to the real G1 robot.

New package src/dm_isaac_g1/sim2sim/ with:
- Data-driven observation builder matching C++ deploy SDK (9 term builders,
  per-term history stacking, scale/clip ordering, joint_ids_map remapping)
- MotionLoader for mimic CSV files with frame interpolation (matches C++
  MotionLoader_: joint_pos/vel reordering, torso kinematic chain for
  motion_anchor_ori_b)
- FSM state machine (Passive/Stand/Walk) matching C++ CtrlFSM
- Keyboard controller (WASD/QE velocity, 1/2/3 FSM, R reset)
- Policy loader (ONNX + JIT), deploy config with auto-detection
- Bad orientation termination check
- CLI command: dm-g1 sim2sim (with all options)
- sim2sim extras in pyproject.toml
- Mimic play.py now exports deploy.yaml

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(routing): decode percent-encoded pathname before route matching

Non-ASCII characters like 'æ' in route paths (e.g. /blogindlæg) are
percent-encoded by the browser in window.location.pathname, causing the
route regex to miss and fall back to renderHome(). Decoding with
decodeURIComponent before matching fixes navigation for both pushState
and popstate.

Also adds heroImage to the security blog post seed.

release: v0.9.0 — Remote Server Safety (#17)

* feat: add 4 remote server safety rules to autopilot pack

Add ssh-destructive-command-guard, remote-boot-partition-guard,
remote-chroot-guard, and package-manager-in-chroot rules that protect
against dangerous operations on remote servers via SSH and chroot.

Includes post-review fixes: renamed allowed_commands→allowed_ops for
config consistency, added per-pattern severity (ERROR for mkfs/dd/
iptables -F/terraform destroy), extended rm --recursive and apt-get
detection, and added 14 new tests for coverage gaps.

1229 tests, 96% coverage.

commit.message:
fix(statusline): eliminate API storm and async cache architecture

- CI status: sync gh api call → background refresh (was blocking 15s)
- check_gh_available: sync gh auth status → background refresh
- API_CACHE_TTL: 120s → 300s (12 req/hr instead of 30)
- Limits 429 backoff: 60s flat → exponential 5m/10m/20m/40m/60m
- Remove BEGIN EXCLUSIVE from bg subprocess (was blocking all keys
  during API call, causing other bg subprocesses to silently fail)
- Atomic _try_claim_refresh: single UPDATE WHERE replaces
  check-then-claim race window
- PR payload: gh api failure no longer overwrites cache with empty
  data (was causing PRs to disappear for 5 minutes)
- Notifications failure isolated: no longer kills PR data
- External slot: add cooldown on error (was retrying every 3s)
- execute_slots: catch all exceptions (was missing TypeError etc)
- provider_limits: hide "retry in Xs" during normal 30s claim-cooldown,
  show only for real 429 backoff
- Remove dead code: cache_put, is_cache_fresh, _is_cooldown_active

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

by autopilot-schedule at install time. Configurable StartInterval
(default 15s), PATH, logging, KeepAlive=false.

log directory.

47 tests covering: template existence, XML validity, substitution markers,

The install target now recommends launchd over cron, so the test
assertion changes from checking for crontab/PATH= to checking for

- Fix _resolve_bin_dir to follow symlinks so autopilot-schedule works

commit.message:
feat: Zero-tolerance portrait verification pipeline (v2.3.0)

Implements multi-layer verification to eliminate wrong-person, wrong-gender,
and hallucinated-date portrait errors:

- utils/ground_truth.py: Wikipedia REST API + Wikidata SPARQL cross-validation;
  extracts gender (P21), birth (P569), death (P570), and thumbnail photo URL;
  enriches SubjectData with Wikipedia-verified facts

- api/models.py: Add `gender` field to SubjectData ('male'/'female'/'unknown')

- core/researcher.py: Extract gender from Gemini response; call GroundTruthVerifier
  after research to enrich dates/gender/photo from Wikipedia/Wikidata

- reference_finder.py: Rewrite with real URL fetching strategies — Wikipedia
  photo (from reference_sources), confirmed institutional URL table, and
  Wikipedia page images API; validates each URL (HTTP 200, PIL, ≥256px, ≥10KB)

- prompt_builder.py: Inject explicit GENDER directive and age-at-portrait-time
  into every generation prompt to prevent gender stereotyping

- core/portrait_verifier.py: Post-generation checks — file size, MD5 duplicate
  detection (caching bug), Gemini Vision overlay date OCR, gender verification,
  and identity comparison against reference photo

- core/generator_enhanced.py: Call PortraitVerifier after each portrait is saved;
  retry on verification failure; MD5 batch duplicate check across all styles

- core/evaluator_enhanced.py: Fix _holistic_evaluation() to send portrait image
  to Gemini Vision API (not text-only) for genuine visual assessment

- config/settings.py: Add enable_portrait_verification,
  enable_ground_truth_lookup, portrait_verification_min_size_kb

Tests: 381 passed, 1 skipped, 61% coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Header: improve nav link contrast (gray-700 instead of gray-400), add

  accent badge, dual CTA buttons, and proper text contrast

  grid layout instead of minimal inline text

  layout, and dual CTA buttons replacing white-on-white design
